name: Artisans, Spyro's Home
oracle: At the beginning of combat on your turn, create your choice of a Treasure token or a 1/1 red and blue Dragon creature token.
chaos: Whenever chaos ensues, create a Treasure token and a 1/1 red and blue Dragon creature token.

name: Mapa chungo
oracle: Al principio del turno TE MUERES LOCO.
